member.name: M:GridForge.Blockers.Blocker.SetCacheCoveredVoxels(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether or not to cache covered voxels for this blocker. If enabled, the blocker will store references to the voxels it covers when applying blockage, which can improve performance when removing blockage at the cost of increased memory usage.

member.name: T:GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration
member.summary: Defines the configuration parameters for a grid, including boundaries, topology, storage, and scan cell size. Used to describe grid properties before a world normalizes and registers the grid.
member.remarks:
MemoryPack GenerateType: unmanaged
FixedMathSharp.Vector3d BoundsMin
FixedMathSharp.Vector3d BoundsMax
int ScanCellSize
GridForge.Grids.Topology.GridTopologyKind TopologyKind
GridForge.Grids.Topology.GridTopologyMetrics TopologyMetrics
GridForge.Grids.Storage.GridStorageKind StorageKind

member.name: F:GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration.DefaultScanCellSize
member.summary: The default size of each scan cell.

member.name: F:GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration.BoundsMin
member.summary: The minimum boundary of the grid in world coordinates.

member.name: F:GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration.BoundsMax
member.summary: The maximum boundary of the grid in world coordinates.

member.name: F:GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration.ScanCellSize
member.summary: The size of each scan cell, determining the granularity of spatial partitioning. Customizable based on grid density and expected entity distribution.

member.name: F:GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration.TopologyKind
member.summary: The cell topology used by this grid. Rectangular-prism grids interpret as local X/Y/Z coordinates; hex-prism grids interpret it as axial Q, vertical layer, and axial R.

member.name: F:GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration.TopologyMetrics
member.summary: The deterministic cell geometry used by this grid's topology. Rectangular-prism metrics define cell width, layer height, and length. Hex-prism metrics define horizontal radius, layer height, and orientation.

member.name: F:GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration.StorageKind
member.summary: The physical voxel storage used by this grid. Dense storage materializes every in-bounds voxel; sparse storage materializes only explicitly configured voxels.

member.name: P:GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration.GridCenter
member.summary: The center point of the grid's bounding volume.

member.name: M:GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration.#ctor(FixedMathSharp.Vector3d,FixedMathSharp.Vector3d,System.Int32,GridForge.Grids.Topology.GridTopologyKind,GridForge.Grids.Topology.GridTopologyMetrics,GridForge.Grids.Storage.GridStorageKind)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with specified bounds and scan cell size. Ensures that is always less than or equal to .
member.param: The minimum boundary of the grid.
The maximum boundary of the grid.
The size of scan cells within the grid. Default is 8.
The topology kind used by the grid. Defaults to rectangular-prism.
Deterministic topology metrics. Defaults to 1x1x1 rectangular-prism cells.
The physical voxel storage kind. Defaults to dense storage.

The allocated world-local grid slot on success.

member.name: M:GridForge.Grids.GridWorld.TryAddGrid(GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{GridForge.Spatial.VoxelIndex},System.UInt16@)
member.summary: Adds a new grid to this world and materializes the supplied sparse voxel indices when sparse storage is configured. Dense grids ignore the configured voxel input and materialize every in-bounds voxel.
member.param: The grid configuration to normalize and register.
Grid-local voxel indices to materialize for sparse storage.
The allocated world-local grid slot on success.
member.returns: True if the grid was added; otherwise false.

member.name: M:GridForge.Grids.GridWorld.TryAddGrid(GridForge.Configuration.GridConfiguration,System.Boolean[0:,0:,0:],System.UInt16@)
member.summary: Adds a new grid to this world and materializes true cells from the supplied sparse voxel mask when sparse storage is configured. Dense grids ignore the configured voxel input and materialize every in-bounds voxel.
member.param: The grid configuration to normalize and register.
A [x, y, z] mask whose true values identify sparse voxels to materialize. Sparse masks must match the normalized grid dimensions.
The allocated world-local grid slot on success.
member.returns: True if the grid was added; otherwise false.

member.summary: A globally unique identifier for the occupant.

member.summary: The group Id used for grouping occupants within a scan cell. Occupants with the same group Id belong to the same logical group. This allows efficient retrieval of related occupants in spatial queries.

member.name: T:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelIndex
member.summary: Represents the topology-local coordinates of a voxel within a single grid. Rectangular-prism grids interpret the fields as X, Y, and Z. Hex-prism grids interpret them as axial Q, vertical layer, and axial R.

member.name: F:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelIndex.x
member.summary: The local X coordinate for rectangular-prism grids, or axial Q coordinate for hex-prism grids.

member.name: F:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelIndex.y
member.summary: The local Y coordinate for rectangular-prism grids, or vertical layer for hex-prism grids.

member.name: F:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelIndex.z
member.summary: The local Z coordinate for rectangular-prism grids, or axial R coordinate for hex-prism grids.

member.name: P:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelIndex.IsAllocated
member.summary: Flag to determine is the struct instance was constructed or is default

member.name: M:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelIndex.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with an X and Y coordinate. Defaults Z to zero.

member.name: M:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelIndex.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with X, Y, and Z coordinates.

member.name: M:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelIndex.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the coordinates.

member.name: M:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelIndex.GetHashCode
member.summary: Computes a hash code for the coordinates, ensuring uniqueness in hashing collections. Uses to generate a stable and consistent hash.

member.name: T:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelNeighborScope
member.summary: Selects which grid groups are included by voxel contact-neighbor queries.

member.name: F:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelNeighborScope.None
member.summary: No neighbor groups are included.

member.name: F:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelNeighborScope.SourceGrid
member.summary: Include touching voxels from only the source voxel's owning grid.

member.name: F:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelNeighborScope.SameTopologyGrids
member.summary: Include touching voxels from other grids with the same topology kind.

member.name: F:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelNeighborScope.MixedTopologyGrids
member.summary: Include touching voxels from grids with a different topology kind.

member.name: F:GridForge.Spatial.VoxelNeighborScope.All
member.summary: Include touching voxels from the source grid, same-topology grids, and mixed-topology grids.

member.summary: The world-local slot index of the grid in .

member.name: F:GridForge.Spatial.WorldVoxelIndex.GridSpawnToken
member.summary: The unique identifier generated by the grid during initialization. Used to ensure the correct instance is at the assigned .

member.name: F:GridForge.Spatial.WorldVoxelIndex.VoxelIndex
member.summary: The local coordinate of a voxel within the grid at .

member.name: T:GridForge.Utility.GridTracer
member.summary: Provides utilities for tracing lines or bounding areas in a grid, aligning them to grid voxels. Uses fixed-point calculations to ensure deterministic and accurate grid traversal.

member.name: M:GridForge.Utility.GridTracer.TraceLine(GridForge.Grids.GridWorld,FixedMathSharp.Vector3d,FixedMathSharp.Vector3d,System.Nullable{FixedMathSharp.Fixed64},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Traces a 3D line between two points in the supplied world. The traced points are returned as grid voxels.
member.remarks: Uses a fractional step algorithm inspired by Bresenham’s line algorithm. This implementation leverages fixed-point math to maintain precision across a deterministic grid.
member.param: The world whose grids should be traced.
Starting position in world space.
Ending position in world space.
Value applied to the start/end positions before snapping.
Whether to include the end voxel in the traced line.
member.returns: A collection of objects representing the traced path.

member.name: M:GridForge.Utility.GridTracer.TraceLine(GridForge.Grids.GridWorld,FixedMathSharp.Vector2d,FixedMathSharp.Vector2d,System.Nullable{FixedMathSharp.Fixed64},System.Boolean,FixedMathSharp.Fixed64)
member.summary: Traces a 2D XZ-plane line between two points in the supplied world, snapping them to grid coordinates.
member.remarks: This method maps to world X, to world Z, and to world Y. The default layer is world Y = 0.
member.param: The world whose grids should be traced.
Starting XZ-plane position in world space.
Ending XZ-plane position in world space.
Value applied to the start/end positions before snapping.
Whether to include the end voxel in the traced line.
The world Y layer to trace. Defaults to zero.
member.returns: A collection of objects representing the traced path.

member.name: M:GridForge.Utility.GridTracer.GetCoveredVoxels(GridForge.Grids.GridWorld,FixedMathSharp.Vector3d,FixedMathSharp.Vector3d,System.Nullable{FixedMathSharp.Fixed64})
member.summary: Retrieves all grid voxels covered by the given bounding area in the supplied world.

member.name: M:GridForge.Utility.GridTracer.GetCoveredVoxels(GridForge.Grids.GridWorld,FixedMathSharp.Vector2d,FixedMathSharp.Vector2d,FixedMathSharp.Fixed64,System.Nullable{FixedMathSharp.Fixed64})
member.summary: Retrieves all grid voxels covered by the given XZ-plane bounding area on the supplied world Y layer.
member.param: The world whose grids should be queried.
The 2D minimum corner whose X component maps to world X and Y component maps to world Z.
The 2D maximum corner whose X component maps to world X and Y component maps to world Z.
The world Y layer to cover. Defaults to zero.
Value applied to the min/max bounds before snapping.
member.returns: A collection of objects representing the covered voxels.

member.name: M:GridForge.Utility.GridTracer.GetCoveredScanCells(GridForge.Grids.GridWorld,FixedMathSharp.Vector3d,FixedMathSharp.Vector3d,System.Nullable{FixedMathSharp.Fixed64})
member.summary: Retrieves all scan cells within the given bounding area across relevant grids in the supplied world.
member.param: The world whose grids should be queried.
The minimum corner of the bounding area.
The maximum corner of the bounding area.
Value applied to the min/max bounds before snapping.
member.returns: An enumerable of covered scan cells grouped by grid.

member.name: M:GridForge.Utility.GridTracer.GetCoveredScanCells(GridForge.Grids.GridWorld,FixedMathSharp.Vector2d,FixedMathSharp.Vector2d,FixedMathSharp.Fixed64,System.Nullable{FixedMathSharp.Fixed64})
member.summary: Retrieves all scan cells within the given XZ-plane bounding area on the supplied world Y layer.
member.param: The world whose grids should be queried.
The 2D minimum corner whose X component maps to world X and Y component maps to world Z.
The 2D maximum corner whose X component maps to world X and Y component maps to world Z.
The world Y layer to cover. Defaults to zero.
Value applied to the min/max bounds before snapping.
member.returns: An enumerable of covered scan cells grouped by grid.

member.summary: Clears and fills caller-owned storage with scan cells covered by the supplied bounding area.
